message: Scorecard: no OpenSSF best-practices badge. Registration is HUMAN-GATED (GitHub login at bestpractices.dev) but the ~60-question passing questionnaire can be pre-drafted by an agent from repo evidence (tests, CI gates, SECURITY.md, signed releases, docs). Most criteria already hold thanks to the 100% coverage gate + security workflows.
